title: Clonal expansion within pneumococcal serotype 6C after use of seven-valent vaccine.
ehr_evidence: The study uses whole-genome sequences of 19 isolates rather than EHR or linked health data.
summary: Genomic analysis of S. pneumoniae serotype 6C isolates to investigate clonal expansion and genetic plasticity following the introduction of the seven-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV7).
key_findings: Four broad phylogenetically distinct lineages were identified.
Rapid clonal expansion occurred within a single MLST clonal complex (CC395).
Plasticity exists within current and potential vaccine-associated loci.
study_design: Genomic analysis and phylogenetic network construction
population: Pediatric and adult population (implied by vaccine context)
